name: chain_ph_launch_gaze_guard_instant_privacy_
method: [PH LAUNCH] Gaze Guard: Instant Privacy & Screen Blur

stages.task: Scrape PH daily for privacy/security/productivity/remote-work app launches, extract founder profiles, emails, LinkedIn, maker pages
Score founders: solo/micro team (<10), launched within 48h, has extractable email or LinkedIn, product is SaaS/app/tool (not hardware)
Cold email with 'saw your PH launch on [product]' personalized hook, offer relevant service (app acceleration, growth, SEO)
